title: PaddlePaddle Open Source Star of the Year
content: Selected as PaddlePaddle Open Source Star of the Year 2025 (Awarded in Beijing, only 10 recipients annually)!

title: University Special Scholarship
content: Awarded the University Special Scholarship (only 10 recipients across the whole university)!

title: Paper Accepted by IEEE BIBM
content: One paper has been accepted by IEEE BIBM 2025!

title: Paper Accepted by IFIP NPC
content: One paper has been accepted by IFIP NPC 2025!

title: PaddlePaddle Sailing Program 5th Edition
content: Won 2nd Place in PaddlePaddle Sailing Program 5th Edition (Only undergraduate among all awardees)!
